title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Master the core concepts of JavaScript — variables, functions, DOM, async/await — with hands-on examples.

title: CSS Grid & Flexbox Mastery
description: Build modern, responsive layouts using CSS Grid and Flexbox. Stop fighting layouts — start owning them.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Learn Python, Pandas, Matplotlib and core ML concepts to start analyzing real datasets.

title: React from Scratch
description: Build production-ready React applications with hooks, context, routing and state management.

title: Docker & Kubernetes Basics
description: Containerize and orchestrate applications using Docker and Kubernetes in real workflows.

title: UI/UX Design Principles
description: Understand user-centered design, wireframing, prototyping, and the psychology behind great interfaces.
